title: Audit ferrolearn-kernel vs sklearn (kernel_approximation + kernel_ridge): close gaps, add API proof tests
description:
Step 10 of 12 in sklearn parity audit (#240).

Small surface. Scope: sklearn.kernel_approximation (Nystroem, RBFSampler, AdditiveChi2Sampler, SkewedChi2Sampler, PolynomialCountSketch), sklearn.kernel_ridge (KernelRidge), and the kernel functions themselves shared with gaussian_process.

Related existing issues: #114 (KernelCenterer)
